obligations.label: Monthly PAYE Remittance
obligations.action: File monthly PAYE schedule and remit to State IRS or FIRS
obligations.portal: State IRS e-portal or FIRS TaxPro Max

obligations.label: Monthly VAT Return & Remittance
obligations.action: File VAT return (Form 002) and remit net VAT payable to NRS

obligations.label: Monthly WHT Remittance & Schedule
obligations.action: File WHT deduction schedule, remit total WHT, and issue Form A credit certificates to vendors
obligations.penalty_interest: 10% per annum + CBN MPR on outstanding balance

obligations.label: Monthly NSITF Levy Remittance
obligations.action: Remit 1% of gross monthly payroll to NSITF

obligations.label: Monthly Pension Contributions
obligations.deadline_display: Within 7 days of salary payment date
obligations.action: Remit employer 10% + employee 8% of emoluments to employee PFAs

obligations.label: Monthly NHF Remittance
obligations.action: Remit 2.5% of employee basic salaries to FMBN
obligations.penalty_late_payment: 6 months imprisonment or ₦50,000 fine (or both) per NHF Act

obligations.label: Annual CIT Return + Development Levy
obligations.action: File CIT return with audited financial statements. Pay CIT + 4% Development Levy.
obligations.penalty_late_payment: 10% of unpaid tax + interest at CBN MPR

obligations.label: Annual Capital Gains Tax Return
obligations.action: Disclose all chargeable asset disposals during the year and compute CGT

obligations.label: Annual PAYE Return (Form H1)
obligations.action: File annual PAYE schedule (Form H1) showing all employees, gross pay, deductions, and PAYE for prior year
obligations.penalty_late_filing: ₦500,000 or 2% of total payroll — whichever is greater

obligations.label: Annual ITF Levy
obligations.action: Pay 1% of prior year gross payroll to ITF. Applies to ≥5 staff or ≥₦50m turnover.

obligations.label: TIN Registration with NRS
obligations.deadline_display: Within 6 months of incorporation or commencement of business
obligations.action: Register with NRS, obtain TIN and VAT registration number if turnover ≥₦25m
obligations.penalty: ₦50,000 first month + ₦25,000 per day of continuing default
